zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley於大約1110年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾麗莉。她於1129年與Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1189年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年81歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯瓦爾 本 格拉莫爾根拉維爾諾可聖 勞倫斯 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley was born about 1110, in Knightley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley in 1129, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1189, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Saint Lawrence Churchyard, Lavernock, Vale of Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley en 1129, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1189, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Lawrence Churchyard, Lavernock, Vale of Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightleyは約1110年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアナイトリーで生まれた。1129年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルでNicholas Maucovenant de Knightleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1189年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで81歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズベル オフ グラモーガンラバーノックサイント ラウレンス チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley(은)는 대략 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 나이틀리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1129년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 발 프 글램르건 레이버노c크 세인트 로렌스 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley em 1129, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley родилась около 1110 г. в местности нагтли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley в 1129 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1189 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности сеинт ларенс чурчярд, лавирнокк, веил оф глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.
